sections.description: WooNuxt is unmatched when it comes to performance and scalability. Reap the benefits of having a online store that out performs all of your competitors.
sections.changelog:
2.5.17

Improve GraphQL query performance by removing the unbounded product query limit override and caching the maximum product price used by settings.

2.5.16

Update required WooCommerce version to 10.9.4 and WooGraphQL version to 1.0.3. Bump plugin metadata to 2.5.16.

2.5.15

Update required setup targets to WooCommerce 10.9.1 and WPGraphQL 2.17.0. Bump plugin metadata to 2.5.15.

2.5.14

Update setup targets to WordPress tested up to 7.0.0, WooCommerce 10.9.1, WPGraphQL 2.17.0, Headless Login for WPGraphQL 0.4.4, Node 22.22.2, and PHP 8.4. Improve first-time setup resilience by exposing woonuxtSettings before WooCommerce is active and moving required-plugin installs out of page rendering.

2.5.13

Add Apple Pay merchant identifier and active Stripe publishable key fields to GraphQL stripeSettings. Return an explicit Stripe GraphQL settings whitelist instead of the raw WooCommerce Stripe gateway settings array.

2.5.12

Expose Stripe account_id in GraphQL stripeSettings for native payment initialization flows.

2.5.11

Remove customerSessionClientSecret field from PaymentIntent GraphQL type and strip CustomerSession creation logic from stripePaymentIntent resolver.

2.5.10

Security fix: correct wp_die() response codes so capability check failures return HTTP 403 instead of 200. Fix undefined $plugin_list variable in legacy AJAX plugin status handler. Add PHP lint CI workflow.

2.5.9

Hardening release: hide Trigger Rebuild unless Build Hook is a non-empty URL, trim build hook checks in admin JS, add capability checks to admin AJAX handlers, register settings sanitize callback on legacy path, and guard settings loops against malformed option data.

2.5.8

Update required plugin install targets to WooCommerce 10.7.0, WPGraphQL 2.12.0, and WooGraphQL 1.0.2.

2.5.7

Fix fatal error on the WooNuxt settings page when WooCommerce attribute helpers are unavailable by guarding product attribute lookups.

2.5.6

Saved cards feature complete: Stripe CustomerSession, savedPaymentMethods GraphQL field, and stripeCustomerId resolver are production-ready. Remove all debug error_log calls from Stripe GraphQL helpers.

2.5.5

Add support for saving Stripe cards for future payments.

2.5.4

Bump required versions: WooCommerce 10.6.1, WPGraphQL 2.10.1 (tested up to WordPress 6.9.4). Security: replace $_SERVER['HTTP_HOST'] with wp_parse_url(home_url()) for domain resolution. Remove debug error_log that logged partial Stripe client secrets. Add PayPal payment gateway settings to GraphQL schema.

2.5.3

Version bump release with housekeeping updates and metadata alignment.

2.5.0

Add fullYoastHead field to drive frontend Yoast integration. Update plugin version metadata and changelog entries.

2.2.4

Major Architectural Refactoring: Complete plugin restructuring to class-based architecture following WordPress standards. New components include WooNuxt_Plugin (singleton), WooNuxt_Admin, WooNuxt_Ajax_Handler, and WooNuxt_Plugin_Manager classes. Added centralized helper functions, constants file, and template system. New GraphQL Schema Reference UI with collapsible details. Massively improved admin UI styling (1500+ CSS improvements). Enhanced code formatting and documentation. Fixes: Improved Stripe payment intent error handling, comprehensive debugging and validation for clientSecret generation to resolve Stripe.js integration issues. Total: 4,020 insertions, 799 deletions across 24 files.

2.2.3

Fix: Add missing Stripe payment intent and setup intent functions to resolve GraphQL stripePaymentIntent query errors.

2.2.2

Enable logout mutation by default. Fix: ensure $options['productsPerPage'] is set before accessing it.

2.2.1

Update WP GraphQL Headless Login version to 0.4.3.

2.2.0

Major security and code quality improvements: Enhanced AJAX security with nonces, comprehensive input sanitization, improved error handling, standardized function naming with woonuxt_ prefix, proper DocBlocks, better JavaScript error handling, and overall code organization.

2.0.1

Update plugin versions.

2.0.0

Move to Headless Login for WPGraphQL.

1.0.58

Improve Stripe add payment option.

1.0.57

Update plugin versions.

1.0.56

Add currencySymbol. Fix Vercel url

1.0.55

Ceil maxPrice value.

1.0.54

Change to setup_intents.

1.0.53

Add stripePaymentIntent for 3d secure.

1.0.52

Bump version.

1.0.51

Inhance Social media fileds and schema.

1.0.50

Add SEO settings

1.0.49

Add functionality to increase max query amount if there are more than 100 products

1.0.45

Fix error when WooCommerce is disabled or not installed
